parameters.query:
SELECT t.tweet_id, t.tweet_text, m.symbol AS company_code,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(h, E'\n') FROM (
      SELECT '- ' || k.headline AS h
      FROM kap_disclosures k
      WHERE k.symbol = m.symbol
      ORDER BY k.published_at DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
    ) sub
  ), 'Resmi KAP aciklamasi yok') AS kap_context
FROM financial_tweets t
JOIN market_stocks m
  ON t.tweet_text ILIKE '%' || m.company_name || '%'
  OR t.tweet_text ~* ('\m' || m.symbol || '\M')
WHERE t.is_processed = false
LIMIT 10;

UPDATE financial_tweets t
SET is_processed = true
WHERE t.is_processed = false
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM market_stocks m
    WHERE t.tweet_text ILIKE '%' || m.company_name || '%'
       OR t.tweet_text ~* ('\m' || m.symbol || '\M')
  );

SELECT n.id, n.symbol, n.headline, n.content,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(h, E'\n') FROM (
      SELECT '- ' || k.headline AS h
      FROM kap_disclosures k
      WHERE k.symbol = n.symbol
      ORDER BY k.published_at DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
    ) sub
  ), 'Resmi KAP aciklamasi yok') AS kap_context
FROM financial_news n
WHERE n.is_processed = false
ORDER BY n.published_at ASC
LIMIT 10;
